case_title: WONG, HARVEY vs. VAVURIS, GENARO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, HARVEY AS TO DEFENDANT VAVURIS, GENARO CARDONA, GABRIELA DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, HARVEY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, HARVEY SERVED APR-27-1998, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT VAVURIS, GENARO CARDONA, GABRIELA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VAVURIS, GENARO CARDONA, GABRIELA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, HARVEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAVURIS, GENARO CARDONA, GABRIELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 402 WARREN DRIVE #8, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VAVURIS, GENARO CARDONA, GABRIELA

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $256.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT VAVURIS, GENARO CARDONA, GABRIELA
DECLARATION OF FRANK WONG FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, HARVEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, HARVEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAVURIS, GENARO CARDONA, GABRIELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF JUNE 3, 1998 $2,093.80 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $256.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,649.80, LEASE FORFEITED
